message:
chore(audit): record batch 431 (recent commits review, final coverage)

Verified recent agent commits: fetch_max i64 signed comparison (SOUND),
AckResolution return type change (SOUND), broadcast_stream Error impl
(SOUND), fabric RaptorQ integration (no dangerous patterns).

Final HashMap determinism sweep: all remaining oracle iterations confirmed
deterministic (Vec-based or already sorted).

Grand total: 39 bugs fixed, 260+ files audited, ~315K+ lines.
Coverage: essentially complete for all production code paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
